probes.name: entitlements-registry-warm
probes.description: EntitlementRegistry hydrated on boot. Ensures at least one #[Entitlement]-declared key registered.

probes.name: entitlements-redis-reachable
probes.description: Redis PING for the hot-path key namespace. Enforcer falls back to Postgres on failure.

probes.name: entitlements-reset-recent
probes.description: ResetPeriodicUsageJob ran in the last 20 minutes (schedule is every 15).

probes.name: entitlements-reconcile-drift
probes.description: Redis ↔ Postgres drift within tolerance (< 100 per key). Sampled across active pool entitlements.

probes.name: entitlements-usage-partition-current
probes.description: EntitlementUsage table has a partition for the current month (Postgres native partitioning).
